Lazarus.Explanation: The Lazarus is a resurrection bot that can turn wrecks into brand new units.

Crossbow.Explanation: The Crossbow is an amphibious anti-air bot that's cheap to build, and can shoot down light air units.

Construction Bot.Explanation: The Construction Bot can build basic Tech 1 structures, and is the cheapest construction unit.

Tick.Explanation: The Tick is a fast scout bot that's cheap to build and perfect for gathering intel on your enemy.

Centurion.Explanation: The Centurion is a durable heavy infantry bot with dual rapid fire lasers, which is perfect against swarms of light units.

Rocketeer.Explanation: The Rocketeer is a light rocket bot that's commonly used for pushing enemy defenses.

Pawn.Explanation: The Pawn is a basic infantry bot that's cheap to build, and can quickly devastate poorly defended expansions, artillery units, and even isolated commanders.

Mace.Explanation: The Mace is a light plasma bot that deals sizeable damage for a relatively low cost to build.

Armada Commander.Explanation: The Armada Commander is the most versatile and important unit in your army.

Archangel.Explanation: The Archangel is an advanced anti-air bot equipped with both long-range (1200) and mid-range (880) rapid-fire missiles.

Tumbleweed.Explanation: The Tumbleweed is a crawling bomb designed for one purpose—to blow up on enemy units and structures.

Fatboy.Explanation: The Fatboy is a heavy mid-range plasma bot that deals ludicrous amounts of damage to units within its area of effect (AoE).

Sprinter.Explanation: The Sprinter is a fast raider bot that's equipped with a short-range rapid-fire machine gun.

Commander.Explanation: The Decoy Commander is a fake version of your actual Armada Commander and can build basic Tech 1 structures, including mines.

Umbrella.Explanation: The Umbrella is a mobile nuclear missile defense system that will shoot down incoming intercontinental ballistic missiles.

Platypus.Explanation: The Platypus is a very fast amphibious bot equipped with a light laser and a basic anti-air missile launcher.

Compass.Explanation: The Compass is a mobile radar bot that gives you intel on enemy units within its range.

Advanced Construction Bot.Explanation: The Advanced Construction Bot can build Tech 2 structures and opens the door to an advanced economy.

Recluse.Explanation: The Recluse is an all-terrain spider bot equipped with multiple rocket launchers.

Sharpshooter.Explanation: The Sharpshooter is a long-range sniper bot that deals 2500 damage per shot.

Ghost.Explanation: The Ghost is a stealthy and cloakable spy bot that's totally invisible to your enemy.

Butler.Explanation: The Butler is a fast assistance bot that can repair units and build a few Tech 1 structures.

Smuggler.Explanation: The Smuggler is a mobile radar jamming bot that keeps units within its jamming range from appearing on the minimap.

Welder.Explanation: The Welder is a general-purpose assault bot equipped with a lightning cannon.

Gunslinger.Explanation: The Gunslinger is a fast skirmish bot that's designed for efficiently destroying most T1 units and some lighter T2.

Hound.Explanation: The Hound is a fast and decently tough bot with a mid-range, low-velocity plasma mortar.

Webber.Explanation: The Webber is an all-terrain spiderbot equipped with a short-range EMP beam.

Titan.Explanation: The Titan takes the title of the heaviest ARMADA unit with stride.

Vanguard.Explanation: The Vanguard is an experimental all-terrain mech that's equipped with a heavy plasma cannon.

Razorback.Explanation: The Razorback is a fast experimental battle mech armed with two powerful rapid-fire laser guns.

Marauder.Explanation: The Marauder is a fast amphibious assault mech that is equipped with two powerful gauss guns and twin light anti-air missile turrets.

Janus.Explanation: The Janus fires twin medium-ranged missiles with each shot, which deal 660 maximum damage in a large radius.

Shellshocker.Explanation: The Shellshocker is a light artillery vehicle that's perfect for destroying Tech 1 defense towers.

Beaver.Explanation: The Beaver is an amphibious construction vehicle that can travel both on land and underwater.

Whistler.Explanation: The Whistler is a medium-range missile truck that can outrange most Tier 1 defensive units, and doubles as light mobile AA.

Pincer.Explanation: The Pincer is a light amphibious tank that can travel on land and underwater.

Rover.Explanation: The Rover is a fast scout vehicle that's cheap to build, and perfect for gathering intel on your enemy.

Construction Vehicle.Explanation: The Construction Vehicle can build basic T1 structures and is an effective unit for expansion on relatively flat terrain.

Groundhog.Explanation: Minelayer vehicles have stealth and a mini-radar jammer.

Stout.Explanation: Medium assault tanks form the armored core of T1 vehicle armies.

Blitz.Explanation: The Blitz is a fast assault tank with dual rapid-fire cannons for close combat engagements.

Starlight.Explanation: The Starlight is a mobile tachyon accelerator vehicle that delivers a devastating 2,500 burst damage with its beam, which can even pierce multiple enemies if it overkills one.

Mauser.Explanation: T2 Artillery can outrange most defenses and mobile units, while being fairly cheap to build.

Turtle.Explanation: The Turtle is an amphibious tank equipped with a cannon and heavy armor.

Shredder.Explanation: Shredder is a mobile anti-air tank equipped with a rapid-fire flak cannon.

Advanced Construction Vehicle.Explanation: The Advanced Construction Vehicle can build Tech 2 structures and opens the door to an advanced economy.

Prophet.Explanation: The Prophet is a mobile radar vehicle that gives you intel on enemy units within its range.

Umbra.Explanation: The Umbra is a mobile radar jamming vehicle that keeps units within its jamming range from appearing on the minimap.

Ambassador.Explanation: The Ambassador is a stealthy rocket launcher that fires its missiles straight up to hit enemy units from a high angle.

Jaguar.Explanation: The Jaguar is a fast raider tank equipped with a lightning cannon (300 range) and a light anti-air turret.

Bull.Explanation: The Bull is a general purpose heavy assault tank equipped with a plasma cannon and significant armor.

Gremlin.Explanation: Gremlin is a stealthy tank equipped with light plasma weapon.

Consul.Explanation: The Consul is a handy construction unit that can run fairly quickly and provide buildpower wherever you need it.

Thor.Explanation: The Thor is an experimental terminator tank that's equipped with a heavy lightning cannon, dual EMP lasers, and an EMP missile launcher.

Tsunami.Explanation: The Tsunami is a seaplane bomber with a payload of 5 bombs.

Falcon.Explanation: The Falcon is a fast moving fighter jet that is designed for eliminating air units.

Puffin.Explanation: The Puffin is a seaplane gunship that drops homing torpedoes into the water.

Osprey.Explanation: Heavy air transports like the Osprey can carry larger units, including Commanders.

Sabre.Explanation: The Sabre is a light seaplane gunship with dual energy blasters.

Stork.Explanation: The Stork is an airborne transportation unit.

Blink.Explanation: The Blink is a cheap and fast air scout that has a huge line of sight.

Construction Seaplane.Explanation: The Construction Seaplane can build basic Tech 1 structures, like other constructors, but can also build additional naval structures.

Cyclone.Explanation: The Cyclone is a fighter seaplane, capable of air–to–air combat.

Horizon.Explanation: The Horizon is a seaplane equipped with advanced radar and sonar.

Banshee.Explanation: The Banshee is a light gunship optimized for swift raids on overextended and vulnerable infrastructure.

Construction Aircraft.Explanation: The Construction Aircraft can build basic Tech 1 structures and is an effective unit for expansion anywhere on the map.

Stormbringer.Explanation: The Stormbringer is a light bomber designed to hit slow-moving targets, static structures, and execute bombing runs on enemy bases.

Abductor.Explanation: Abductor is a fast, radar-stealthed transport aircraft armed with a powerful EMP beam.

Advanced Construction Aircraft.Explanation: Advanced Construction Aircraft is a unit that builds most of the T2 economy and defensive structures.

Highwind.Explanation: The Highwind is a fast moving stealth fighter that's designed for eliminating multiple and/or heavy air units.

Hornet.Explanation: The Hornet is an extremely fast gunship designed to quickly destroy priority targets while shrugging off even moderate AA.

Stiletto.Explanation: Stiletto is an EMP bomber, which drops paralyzing charges to stun units in a long line.

Blizzard.Explanation: Blizzard is a heavy and slow bomber that can deal great amounts of damage flying over units and structures.

Roughneck.Explanation: The Roughneck is a rapid-firing gunship.

Liche.Explanation: Liche is the ultimate weapon of terror and destruction.

Oracle.Explanation: The Oracle is an aircraft equipped with advanced radar and sonar.

Skater.Explanation: The Skater is a light scout & Anti-air ship.

Grim Reaper.Explanation: Grim Reaper is a stealthy resurrection submarine.

Construction Ship.Explanation: Construction Ship is the T1 naval constructor.

Banshee.Explanation: The Banshee is a light gunship optimized for swift raids on overextended and vulnerable infrastructure.

Dolphin.Explanation: Dolphin is a fast and maneuverable light assault ship.

Corsair.Explanation: Corsair is the heaviest of the T1 ships.

Epoch.Explanation: The Epoch is Armada's Flagship—a massive artillery platform combining overwhelming firepower with unmatched range.

Advanced Construction Sub.Explanation: Advanced Construction Sub is the T2 sea constructor.

Maelstrom.Explanation: Raider ships give T2 Armada fleets an alternative to Dolphins, complete with light AA for fending off drones and seaplanes.

Haven.Explanation: Support Ships fulfill 3 roles: intel; mobile energy generation; and anti-nuke capability on water.

Bermuda.Explanation: Bermuda is a radar jammer ship.

Sweeper.Explanation: The Sweeper is a mobile anti-air hovercraft that's perfect for taking out light aircraft over the sea and land, while enjoying immunity to torpedoes.

Crocodile.Explanation: The Crocodile is a light hovercraft with a plasma cannon.

Sentry.Explanation: The Sentry is a light laser tower that can take out light vehicles and bots.

Seeker.Explanation: The Seeker is a cheap, fast hovercraft with a close-range laser weapon.

Possum.Explanation: The Possum is a light hovercraft with a rocket launcher.

Construction Hovercraft.Explanation: The Construction Hovercraft can build basic Tech 1 structures, like other constructors, but can also build additional naval structures.

Lunkhead.Explanation: The Lunkhead is an experimental hovertank.

Bot Lab.Explanation: The Bot Lab is a factory capable of producing Tech 1 bot units and can only be built on the land.

Aircraft Plant.Explanation: The Aircraft Plant is a factory capable of producing Tech 1 aircraft units and can only be built on land.

Seaplane Platform.Explanation: The Seaplane Platform is a factory capable of producing Tech 1 seaplane units and can only be built on water.

Shipyard.Explanation: The Shipyard is a factory capable of producing Tech 1 naval units and can only be built on the water.

Hovercraft Platform.Explanation: The Hovercraft Platform is a factory capable of producing Tech 1 hovercraft units and can only be built on land.

Amphibious Complex.Explanation: The Amphibious Complex is a factory capable of producing amphibious units and can only be built underwater.

Vehicle Plant.Explanation: The Vehicle Plant is a factory capable of producing Tech 1 vehicle units and can only be built on land.

Naval Hovercraft Platform.Explanation: The Naval Hovercraft Platform is a factory capable of producing Tech 1 hovercraft units and can only be built on the water.

Advanced Shipyard.Explanation: The Advanced Shipyard is a factory capable of producing Tech 2 naval units and can only be built on the water.

Advanced Vehicle Plant.Explanation: The Advanced Vehicle Plant is a factory capable of producing Tech 2 vehicle units and can only be built on land.

Advanced Aircraft Plant.Explanation: The Advanced Aircraft Plant is a factory capable of producing Tech 2 aircraft units and can only be built on land.

Advanced Bot Lab.Explanation: The Advanced Bot Lab is a factory capable of producing Tech 2 bot units and can only be built on land.

Experimental Gantry.Explanation: The Experimental Gantry is a factory capable of producing powerful experimental units.

Shark's Teeth.Explanation: The Shark’s Teeth are basic defensive walls that block most Tech 1 naval units and low-altitude projectiles.

Ferret.Explanation: The Ferret is an anti-air missile battery that can easily shoot down most T1 and even some T2 aircraft.

Heavy Mine.Explanation: The Heavy Naval Mine is a land mine designed to damage or destroy armored naval units.

Beamer.Explanation: The Beamer is a turret that fires a continuous high-intensity laser beam.

Juno.Explanation: The Juno can build and stockpile anti-micro-electronics missiles.

Harpoon.Explanation: The Harpoon is a torpedo launcher that targets ships and submarines within its range.

Dragon's Claw.Explanation: Disguised as a block of DT (Dragon's Teeth), this turret pops up to attack when enemies get close.

Gauntlet.Explanation: The Gauntlet is a medium-range plasma artillery battery with modest AoE.

Light Mine.Explanation: The Light Mine is a land mine designed to damage or destroy lightly armored units including vehicles and bots.

Manta.Explanation: The Manta is a floating heavy laser tower that can be built on water, and is notably sturdier than its land version.

Overwatch.Explanation: The Overwatch comfortably outranges almost every Tier 1 land unit, except for artillery.

Nettle.Explanation: The Nettle is a light anti-air missile tower that can shoot down light aircraft.

Chainsaw.Explanation: The Chainsaw is a bomb-resistant anti-air missile battery that can take down most aircraft.

Naval Nettle.Explanation: The Naval Nettle is a light anti-air missile tower that can shoot down light aircraft, and can be built on water.

Dragon's Teeth.Explanation: Dragon’s Teeth (DT) are basic defensive walls that block most T1 units and low-altitude projectiles.

Medium Mine.Explanation: Medium Mines are for killing tougher enemies than light mines, such as heavier bots or medium tanks.

Anemone.Explanation: The Anemone is a torpedo launcher that targets ships and submarines within its range from the shore.

Pit Bull.Explanation: The Pit Bull is a powerful defense turret sporting a heavy gauss cannon.

Naval Arbalest.Explanation: The Naval Arbalest is a short-range anti-air gun that deals high damage with a large area of effect (AoE) and can be built on water.

Fortification Wall.Explanation: The Fortification Wall is an advanced defensive wall that blocks most Tech 1 & Tech 2 units and low-altitude projectiles.

Citadel.Explanation: The Citadel is a nuclear missile defense system that will shoot down incoming intercontinental ballistic missiles targeted within its 2,000 coverage radius.

Rattlesnake.Explanation: The Rattlesnake is pop-up plasma artillery battery that can be cloaked.

Mercury.Explanation: The Mercury's extremely long-range missiles easily destroys most aircraft before they even get close to your base.

Ragnarok.Explanation: The Ragnarok is a rapid-fire long-range plasma cannon and is the ultimate weapon of mass-destruction.

Tracer.Explanation: The Tracer is an Intrusion Countermeasure System or "ICS" for short.

Gorgon.Explanation: The Gorgon is a floating rapid-fire plasma tower that can be built on the water.

Keeper.Explanation: The Keeper is a shield generator that deflects plasma artillery and can take a lot of damage before going down.

Armageddon.Explanation: The Armageddon is a nuclear missile launcher and is useful for turning enemy bases and whole armies into ashes.

Paralyzer.Explanation: The Paralyzer is a electromagnetic pulse (EMP) missile launcher that paralyzes all units within its blast radius.

Pulsar.Explanation: The Pulsar is a long-range tachyon accelerator laser tower that delivers a devastating amount of damage.

Basilica.Explanation: The Basilica is an LRPC (Long-Range Plasma Cannon) that can shoot targets across the map.

Moray.Explanation: The Moray is an advanced torpedo launcher that targets ships and submarines within its range.

Arbalest.Explanation: The Arbalest is a short-range anti-air flak gun that deals high damage with a large area of effect (AoE).

Naval Construction Turret.Explanation: The Naval Construction Turret can assist and repair nearby units, and can be built on the water.

Naval Metal Storage.Explanation: The Naval Metal Storage increases your metal storage capacity by 3000 and can be built underwater.

Tidal Generator.Explanation: The Tidal Generator produces energy through water movement.

Wind Turbine.Explanation: The Wind Turbine produces energy using the wind.

Energy Storage.Explanation: The Energy Storage increases your energy storage capacity by 6000.

Radar Tower.Explanation: The Radar Tower provides early warning of enemy units and their movements on the battlefield.

Metal Storage.Explanation: The Metal Storage increases your metal storage capacity by 3000.

Naval Radar / Sonar Tower.Explanation: The Naval Radar/Sonar Tower provides early warning of enemy units in the air, on land, and even underwater.

Geothermal Powerplant.Explanation: The Geothermal Powerplant produces energy using steam.

Energy Converter.Explanation: The Energy Converter converts energy into metal, and can be built by the Commander or other construction units.

Twilight.Explanation: The Twilight is similar to the Metal Extractor, except it can be cloaked to hide it from your enemy.

Construction Turret.Explanation: The Construction Turret can assist and repair nearby units, and it has more build power than any other unit, excluding the Commander.

Offshore Geothermal Powerplant.Explanation: Underwater variant of the Armada Land GeothermalStrategy GuidesOffshore Geothermal Powerplantis a possible counter forNo items found.

Metal Extractor.Explanation: The Metal Extractor extracts metal from metal spots on each map.

Beholder.Explanation: The Beholder is a tiny observation structure that can be built practically anywhere, even on the side of steep cliffs.

Naval Energy Storage.Explanation: The Naval Energy Storage increases your energy storage capacity by 6000 and can be built underwater.

Advanced Solar Collector.Explanation: The Advanced Solar Collector produces energy using the sun.

Sneaky Pete.Explanation: The Sneaky Pete is a mid-range radar jammer.

Naval Energy Converter.Explanation: The Naval Energy Converter converts energy into metal and can be built on the water.

Solar Collector.Explanation: The Solar Collector produces energy using the sun.

Advanced Geothermal Powerplant.Explanation: The Advanced Geothermal Powerplant produces energy using steam.

Naval Fusion Reactor.Explanation: The Naval Fusion Reactor produces energy using heat from nuclear fusion reactions and can be built on the water.

Naval Pinpointer.Explanation: The Pinpointer enhances the accuracy of radar for the entire team, reducing the amount of radar dot 'wobble' by half for each targeting facility.

Cloakable Fusion Reactor.Explanation: The Cloakable Fusion Reactor is similar to the Fusion Reactor, except it can be cloaked to hide it from your enemy.

Naval Advanced Energy Converter.Explanation: The Advanced Navel Energy Converter converts energy into metal and can be built on the water.

Prude.Explanation: The Prude is a Safe Geothermal Powerplant that produces 750 energy using steam.

Pinpointer.Explanation: The Pinpointer enhances the accuracy of radar for the entire team, reducing the amount of radar dot 'wobble' by half for each targeting facility.

Air Repair Pad.Explanation: Strategy GuidesAir Repair Padis a possible counter forNo items found.

Naval Advanced Metal Extractor.Explanation: The Naval Advanced Metal Extractor extracts more metal from metal spots on each map.

Fusion Reactor.Explanation: The Fusion Reactor produces energy using heat from nuclear fusion reactions.

Decoy Fusion Reactor.Explanation: The Decoy Fusion Reactor doesn't produce any energy and is instead used to trick the enemy.

Hardened Energy Storage.Explanation: The Hardened Energy Storage increases your energy storage capacity by 40000.

Advanced Metal Extractor.Explanation: The Advanced Metal Extractor extracts more metal from metal spots on each map.

Advanced Fusion Reactor.Explanation: The Advanced Fusion Reactor produces energy using heat from nuclear fusion reactions.

Advanced Radar Tower.Explanation: The Advanced Radar Tower provides early warning of enemy units and their movements on the battlefield.

Hardened Metal Storage.Explanation: The Hardened Metal Storage increases your metal storage capacity by 10000.

Advanced Energy Converter.Explanation: The Advanced Energy Converter converts energy into metal.

Advanced Sonar Station.Explanation: The Advanced Sonar Station is similar to the Advanced Radar Tower, except it detects sea units instead of land or air units.

Veil.Explanation: The Veil's long-range radar jammer can effectively hide large forces or even entire bases from enemy sensors.
